news-global-econ.title: Mariska Hargitay dines with Jalen Brunson’s parents ahead of Taylor Swift’s reported wedding | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: Mariska Hargitay and husband Peter Hermann dined with New York Knicks player Jalen Brunson’s parents, Rick and Sandra Brunson, the night before Taylor Swift’s reported wedding. (Credit: Dario Alequin for Fox News Digital)

news-global-econ.title: Glizzy Gambling: Best bets for the 2026 Nathan's Hot Dog Eating Contest in Coney Island, Brooklyn
news-global-econ.description: Extreme heat forecasted for Coney Island could shake up Nathan's Hot Dog Eating Contest odds as Joey Chestnut targets his 18th Mustard Belt win.

news-global-econ.title: NYC rent board dissenter warns Mamdani-backed freeze could hurt affordable housing over time: 'Slow burn'
news-global-econ.description: Rental Guidelines Board member Arpit Gupta said he disagrees with the freeze and favors a targeted approach that focuses more on low-income tenants.

news-global-econ.title: Illegal Aliens from Romania Plead Guilty in Nearly $1M Food Stamp Fraud Scheme
news-global-econ.description:
A pair of Romanian brothers, who are in the U.S. illegally, have pleaded guilty to a nearly $1 million scheme to defraud the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), which involved the theft of American identities.

news-korea-soc.title: Experts say ‘deeply’ concerned over Iran’s work at underground nuclear site
news-korea-soc.description: Pickaxe Mountain, a secret nuclear site in the Zagros Mountains, shows continued construction per satellite imagery. IAEA inspectors have not been allowed to visit the facility.

news-global-soc.title: Report: 3 Shot in Mall After Argument Between Groups Leads to Gunfire
news-global-soc.description:
Three people were shot, two of them fatally, following an alleged argument early Friday afternoon at the Dearborn, Michigan, Fairlane Town Center mall.

news-global-soc.title: Military allies, historic tall ships converge on New Jersey shores to launch America 250 celebrations
news-global-soc.description: Video captures roughly 20 nations' tall ships arriving at Sandy Hook as the Coast Guard Eagle prepares to lead a historic parade of ships Saturday.

news-global-soc.title: Trump grants pardons to 'persecuted' mechanics in right-to-repair crackdown: 'I am setting them all free'
news-global-soc.description: Trump granted full pardons to six people, calling the prosecutions "weaponization." The people granted clemency have not yet been identified.

news-global-soc.title: Cole Hauser says his family helped shape Montana as fans follow Taylor Sheridan from Treasure State to Texas
news-global-soc.description: "Dutton Ranch" star Cole Hauser says his family has deep roots in Montana dating back to 1886, long before "Yellowstone" brought millions of viewers to the state.
